metadata.title: Lookout-MobileThreat-NotifyAndEnrich
metadata.description: When a high or critical severity mobile threat incident is created in Microsoft Sentinel by Lookout, this playbook enriches the incident with a detailed investigation comment including threat intelligence context, device risk details, and recommended next steps for the analyst.
prerequisites: 1. The playbook managed identity must be granted the Microsoft Sentinel Responder role on the Log Analytics workspace.
postDeployment: 1. Assign the Microsoft Sentinel Responder role to the playbook managed identity on your Log Analytics workspace.
2. In Microsoft Sentinel, create an Automation Rule that runs this playbook when incidents are created by the 'Lookout - High Severity Mobile Threats Detected (v2)' analytic rule.

metadata.description: Name for the Logic App playbook resource.

body.message:
🤖 Lookout Mobile Threat — Automated Response Summary

Threat Intelligence
• Type: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ThreatType']?[0]}
• Category: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ThreatCategory']?[0]}
• Risk Score: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ThreatRiskScore']?[0]}/10
• Status: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ThreatStatus']?[0]}
• Classifications: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ThreatClasses']?[0]}

Device Risk Context
• Platform: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DevicePlatform']?[0]}
• Security Status: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceSecStatus']?[0]}
• Risk Level: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['DeviceRiskLevel']?[0]}
• Compliance Impact: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['ComplianceImpact']?[0]}
• MDM Connector: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['additionalData']?['customDetails']?['MDMConnectorId']?[0]}

Actions Taken
✅ Incident enriched with Lookout threat intelligence

Recommended Next Steps
1. Verify remediation in Lookout console — check threat status is RESOLVED
2. If MDM is integrated, confirm quarantine/compliance policy enforcement
3. Extract IOCs (package SHA, app name) and check for other affected devices
4. Escalate to Tier 2 if device owner is unresponsive within 2 hours
5. Review ThreatClassifications for lateral movement indicators
